posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Krish,

Sorry you’re experiencing issues here!

Can I ask you to please break up the automation and test this once more?

If you can create a seperate automation for the second section of the automation (as shown below) and run the automation again that would be great
